subject: 🏃 Monday — Hip & Core A (Chassis Build Week 1)
html:
Today's workout: Hip & Core A (~45 min) — your first Chassis Build session. The goal today is to learn the movements and establish the routine. Every lower-body exercise is bodyweight. Don't chase intensity; chase form.

Session flow: Start with the daily mobility flush (~12 min), then the warm-up (foam roll, banded hip IR activator, banded distraction, 90/90 transitions, glute bridges), then 3 rounds of the main circuit, then the finisher (wall sits + TKE right leg), then cool-down.

Knee context: Your last two running efforts (Apr 12 and Apr 16) both flagged Yellow — no pain during, but awareness afterward. Today's session is all gym work with no impact, so you're clear. But pay attention to how the knee feels during wall sits and single-leg glute bridges. Any sharp sensation = stop and note it.

Focus cue: Work both sides equally and slowly. The PT found bilateral hip IR limitation — left and right get identical reps, identical attention. The only right-side-specific exercise is TKE in the finisher. Exhale slowly on effort; slow down on all single-leg work.

Where you are: Week 1 of 4 in Chassis Build — 25 days to your PT follow-up on May 15, 14 weeks to race day. These four weeks are about rebuilding the chassis so the knee can carry marathon mileage. Mobility and hip strength are the primary work now, not miles.

Hip & Core A — Exercise Table (all 3×8–10 or as noted):

ExerciseLoadSets × RepsNotes
Warm-up
Foam roll (IT band, TFL, glutes, quads, adductors)—30 sec each, both sides5 min total
Quadruped banded hip IR (PT)Light band8 reps each sideActivator — before main work
Banded hip distraction w/ IR emphasisBand90 sec each side
90/90 transitionsBodyweight10 repsSwitch sides on floor
Glute bridges (banded)Light band above knees15 reps2-sec squeeze at top
Main Circuit — 3 Rounds
90/90 PAILs/RAILsBodyweight3 × 10 sec each direction, each side#1 exercise for hip IR
Side-lying clamshell (banded)Light band3 × 15 each side2-sec hold at top, hips stacked
Single-leg glute bridgeBodyweight3 × 12 each sideDrive through heel, 2-sec hold
Hip airplaneBodyweight3 × 8 each sideBalance + control first
Copenhagen plankBodyweight3 × 20 sec each sideBuild to 30 sec by Week 3
Dead bug w/ banded pulldown (PT)Light band overhead2–3 × 10 marchesVery slow. Low back pressed to floor.
Chin tuck + lifts (PT)Bodyweight2 reps × 3 directions, 3-sec holdFront, diagonal L, diagonal R
Pallof press (isometric)Light band3 × 15 sec each sideArms straight, resist rotation
Finisher
Wall sitBodyweight45 sec × 3
TKE — right leg onlyLight band3 × 15Band behind knee, extend fully
Cool-down
Pigeon pose—60 sec each side
Couch stretch—60 sec each side

Don't forget the daily mobility flush before or after the session (T-spine extensions, standing lunges w/ IR, world's greatest stretch, 90/90, couch stretch, hip CARs, cat-cow).
